known_issues.gage_launch: PENDING — gage_ai.py requires heavy deps (whisper, pygame, trimesh, transformers, torch). Needs dedicated venv for Gage. gage_chat and gage_read_code work fine via LlamaConnector.
known_issues.gage_model: Gage uses LlamaConnector() default — currently picks up active model from settings. Future: add gage_model field to settings.json for sovereign model assignment.
known_issues.duplicate_scroll_tabs: Old bad-drop tabs (test.js from before regex fix) persist in canvas between restarts if canvas state is saved. Clear canvas history if stale tabs appear.

architecture_notes.pre_intercept_guard: chat_engine._is_gage_cmd — any message starting with 'gage' bypasses WormBot file intercept
architecture_notes.debug_comment_strip: response_no_comments strips # lines before debug pattern — prevents source code comments matching [DEBUG:...] blocks
architecture_notes.lang_map_aliases: debug_view.py lang_map now covers: js, py, sh, rs, md, json, css, html
architecture_notes.gage_model_behavior: Gage uses active model from LlamaConnector default — same model as Ethica currently. Sovereign model assignment is a future feature.
architecture_notes.wormbot_ext_order: file_pattern regex: py|json|js — json MUST come before js to prevent .json matching as .js

session_philosophy: River — flows around obstacles, carries things forward, finds path of least resistance to right answer.
